welcome.title: Welcome to the Photo Editor
welcome.body: A quick tour of how to lay your photos into the printable answer sheets. You can replay it anytime from the ? button.

sets.title: Your answer sheets
sets.body: Photos sent from Map Corridors arrive pre-sorted into Set 1 and Set 2 (the two answer-sheet pages). Track and turning-point photos go to their matching sets.

edit.title: Fine-tune a photo
edit.body: Click any photo to adjust brightness, contrast, sharpness, white balance and crop. For a missing turning point, use "Insert no photo" to keep the numbering correct.

tray.title: Candidate tray
tray.body: Photos that don't fit a full sheet wait in the tray below — drag any of them into an open slot.

export.title: Export the PDF
export.body: When the sheets look right, export them to a print-ready PDF.

help.title: Replay anytime
help.body: Open this tour again whenever you need it from this ? button.

app.title: Photo Editor
app.subtitle: Organize your navigation flight photos into standardized PDF layouts

landscape.name: Landscape
landscape.tooltip: Landscape layout with 9 photos per page

portrait.name: Portrait
portrait.tooltip: Portrait layout with 10 photos per page

warning.title: Layout Change Notice
warning.message: Switching to landscape mode will hide the 10th photo from each set. The photos will not be deleted and will reappear when you switch back to portrait mode.

track.name: Track Photos
track.description: Standard navigation flight photos with randomizable order

turningpoint.name: Turning Point Photos
turningpoint.description: Sequential turning point photos (SP, TP1-TPx, FP)

competition.title: Competition

delete.title: Delete Competition
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
delete.warning: This action cannot be undone. All photos and settings will be permanently deleted.

helper.leaveEmptyForDefault: Leave empty to use default naming

competition.reachingLimit: You have {{count}} competitions. When you reach 10, the oldest will be automatically suggested for cleanup.

upload.invalidFileType: Invalid file type. Please use JPEG or PNG files only.
upload.electronDialogFailed: Could not open the photo picker. Try again, or drag photos from File Explorer.
upload.allFilesFailed: None of the {{count}} selected photos could be read. Check the files exist and are JPEG/PNG under 30 MB.
upload.partialImport: Imported {{success}} of {{total}} photos. {{failed}} could not be read (corrupted, too large, or not JPEG/PNG).
upload.workingDirPersistFailed: Photos imported, but the working folder could not be saved for next time.
upload.clipboardEmpty: Nothing to paste — the clipboard has no JPEG/PNG photos or file references.
upload.clipboardReadFailed: Could not read the clipboard. Try copying the photos again, or drag them from File Explorer.
upload.clipboardAllFailed: None of the {{count}} pasted items could be read (wrong format, too large, or not JPEG/PNG).
upload.clipboardPartial: Pasted {{success}} of {{total}} photos. {{failed}} could not be read (wrong format, too large, or not JPEG/PNG).
upload.addFilesFailed: Photos were read, but could not be stored. Try again, or check available disk space.

importControl.label: Add photos
importControl.tooltip: Click to pick photos, drag-drop here, or press Ctrl+V to paste

photo.tryAgain: Please try again or upload a different file.

circleMode.clickToPlace: Move mouse over photo and click to place

session.checkConnection: Please ensure the Python backend server is running.
session.newSessionInfo: A new session will be created automatically when you upload your first photo.

instructions.title: Welcome to Photo Editor!
instructions.subtitle: Here's how to get started:
instructions.step1: 1. Upload photos to Set 1 and Set 2 using the drag & drop zones above
instructions.step2: 2. Click on any photo to edit brightness, contrast, cropping and positioning
instructions.step3: 3. Photos are automatically labeled (A, B, C...) for competition requirements
instructions.step4: 4. Generate your final PDF when ready - it will be formatted for A4 printing
instructions.tips: 💡 Tips: You can drag photos to reorder them, and use the shuffle button to randomize order!

status.critical: Critical storage usage: {{percent}}%. Consider cleaning up old competitions.
status.high: High storage usage: {{percent}}%. You may want to clean up old competitions soon.

cleanup.title: Storage Cleanup Suggestions
cleanup.subtitle: Found {{count}} competitions to clean up:
cleanup.willFree: This will free approximately {{size}} of storage.
cleanup.autoCleanupInfo: Automatic cleanup suggestions help keep your storage organized.

opfs.warning: Local persistence is not available in this browser. Work won’t be saved after reload. Recommended: Chrome, Firefox, or Edge.

footer.copy: Built in {{year}} by {{name}} for fellow aviators.

errors.noActiveCompetition: No active competition to add photos to
errors.photoSetFull: Set {{set}} is full. Remove a photo first.
errors.photoSetCapacityRemaining: Set {{set}} can take only {{count}} more photo(s).
errors.setOverCapacity: This set already has {{current}} photos but the cap is now {{cap}}. Please reload the competition or remove photos before adding more.
errors.candidateDeletePartialFailure: Failed to delete {{failed}} of {{total}} candidate files. They may still occupy storage.

candidates.title: Candidates ({{count}})
candidates.emptyHint: Drop extra photos here — drag any onto a slot to use it in the print set
candidates.dragHint: Drag a thumbnail onto an empty slot to add it to the print set, or use the toolbar buttons below each photo.
candidates.smartDropToast: Added {{count}} photos to Candidates — drag any onto a slot to use them.
candidates.reflowFailed: Couldn't re-sort {{count}} photo(s) to the new set split — they may be on the wrong sheet. It will retry automatically.
candidates.crossSetHint: Cross-set moves go via the Candidates tray. Drag the photo there, then drag it into the other set.
candidates.allFiltered: All candidates are hidden by the filter.

cleanup.title: Delete unused candidates?
cleanup.message: You have {{count}} candidate photos that aren't in the final set. Delete them to free ~{{size}} MB of storage?
cleanup.error: Failed to delete candidates. Some files may still occupy storage.
cleanup.allPromoted: None of the {{count}} candidates were deleted — they were moved to slots before confirm.

handoff.unavailable: Cross-app sync with the map view is unavailable — picks made in the map won't appear here until storage is restored.

error.renderFailed: Couldn't create the PDF. Some photos ({{count}}) have no image data and can't be rendered — they were probably deleted earlier. Re-import them in Map Corridors and send them to the editor, or remove those cells in the editor, then export again.
error.generic: Couldn't create the PDF. Please try again.
